privileged_info_summary: The task requires optimizing an OpenRocket example file ('simple_model_rocket.ork', a synthetic educational design) which is dynamically modified by the setup script to include an overpowered 'C6' motor and an undersized 0.152m parachute. The agent must correct these components to pass verifier checks for altitude constraints (130m to 170m) and a ground hit velocity limit (<= 5.5 m/s). Notably, while the task description explicitly requires achieving a 'Stability margin >= 1.5 calibers', the verifier scripts entirely lack any logic to evaluate or score the stability margin.
